lens.question: Which concepts share substantial constitutional language but have no explicit relation, and would relating them increase explanatory power without collapsing their difference?

self_prompt:
Which concepts share substantial constitutional language but have no explicit relation, and would relating them increase explanatory power without collapsing their difference?

Use only the snapshotted Root Logos constitution as evidence. Preserve differences, expose uncertainty, and return a testable proposal rather than a canonical claim.

evidence: Connects awareness to stewardship through voluntary, responsible participation in the systems that produce reality.
Conscious responsibility for maintaining and increasing the coherence of a shared field.
findings.claim: Conscious Participation and Stewardship share coherence, participation, responsibility, stewardship, vocation but have no explicit constitutional relation.
findings.proposed_test: Ask whether an explicit relation between bridge-003 and stewardship explains an existing pathway that cannot already be regenerated through their current neighbors.

evidence: The stabilization of experience into coherent structure.
The field in which experience becomes knowable.
findings.claim: Knowing and Consciousness share consciousness, experience, identity, knowing but have no explicit constitutional relation.
findings.proposed_test: Ask whether an explicit relation between knowing and consciousness explains an existing pathway that cannot already be regenerated through their current neighbors.

titles: Knowing and the Experience of Time
evidence: Knowing stabilizes experience into coherent structure across time.
An observation that identity may be continuity of remembered relation rather than static essence.
findings.claim: Knowing and the Experience of Time and Time, Memory, and Identity share identity, knowing, memory, time but have no explicit constitutional relation.
findings.proposed_test: Ask whether an explicit relation between logos-1 and field-note-time-memory explains an existing pathway that cannot already be regenerated through their current neighbors.

evidence: Truthful involvement in a shared field without possession.
Connects orientation toward a higher reference to the lived reorganization through which intelligence becomes a medium of coherent participation.
findings.claim: Participation and From Reference to Participation share corrigibility, intelligence, participation, source but have no explicit constitutional relation.
findings.proposed_test: Ask whether an explicit relation between participation and bridge-004 explains an existing pathway that cannot already be regenerated through their current neighbors.

evidence: A constitution matures when its grammar carries its first commitments without requiring their continuous declaration.
Connects orientation toward a higher reference to the lived reorganization through which intelligence becomes a medium of coherent participation.
findings.claim: The Generative Compression Principle and From Reference to Participation share coherence, corrigibility, scaffolding, source but have no explicit constitutional relation.
findings.proposed_test: Ask whether an explicit relation between principle-generative-compression and bridge-004 explains an existing pathway that cannot already be regenerated through their current neighbors.

evidence: Connects constitutional citizenship to participation without possession as the discipline that keeps civilization free.
Nothing needs to be won, therefore everything can be fully played. To give yourself completely to the game while requiring nothing from it in return.
findings.claim: Freedom Through Non-Possession and From Nihilism to Freedom share freedom, non-possession, participation but have no explicit constitutional relation.
findings.proposed_test: Ask whether an explicit relation between bridge-002 and field-note-nihilism-freedom explains an existing pathway that cannot already be regenerated through their current neighbors.

evidence: Connects orientation toward a higher reference to the lived reorganization through which intelligence becomes a medium of coherent participation.
Peace becomes inhabitable when attention hears the sustaining rhythm beneath ambition, fear, language, and noise.
findings.claim: From Reference to Participation and The Music in Silence share attention, coherence, participation but have no explicit constitutional relation.
findings.proposed_test: Ask whether an explicit relation between bridge-004 and field-note-music-silence explains an existing pathway that cannot already be regenerated through their current neighbors.

evidence: Peace becomes inhabitable when attention hears the sustaining rhythm beneath ambition, fear, language, and noise.
Intelligence becomes coherent when it ceases to operate only as a possessed faculty and becomes conscious participation in a generative order greater than the individual.
findings.claim: The Music in Silence and Intelligence as Participation share attention, coherence, participation but have no explicit constitutional relation.
findings.proposed_test: Ask whether an explicit relation between field-note-music-silence and logos-5 explains an existing pathway that cannot already be regenerated through their current neighbors.

findings.proposed_test: Ask whether an explicit relation between identity and field-note-time-memory explains an existing pathway that cannot already be regenerated through their current neighbors.

findings.proposed_test: Ask whether an explicit relation between knowing and identity explains an existing pathway that cannot already be regenerated through their current neighbors.
